title: thalictrum urbaini var. urbaini
intro: Thalictrum urbaini var. urbaini, also known as Mead's milkwort or the common meadow rue, is a perennial plant species in the family Ranunculaceae. It has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Thalictrum urbaini var. urbaini include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
